html:
Exclusive to:

The Eye of the Tiger Shark is a Food Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is dropped by the Tiger Shark and can be used to craft the Super Spyglass. When eaten, it will restore 60 Health, and 75 hunger at the cost of 15 Sanity. It is considered Meat, therefore if left on the ground, nearby Wildbores, Spiders and Snakes will be attracted to it and will eat it.

Usage

Tips

  • If the player wishes to deliberately spawn Crocodogs or Sea Hounds, dropping the Eye of the Tiger Shark in the ocean repeatedly is the quickest way of doing so due to its high hunger value. Each time it is dropped, there is a 37.5% chance of spawning the mobs.

Trivia

  • The name might be a reference to the song Eye of the Tiger.
  • Food-wise, this item can be considered the Shipwrecked counterpart to the Deerclops Eyeball.

The Eye of the Tiger Shark is a Food Item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is dropped by the Tiger Shark and can be used to craft the Super Spyglass. When eaten, it will restore 60 Health, and 75 hunger at the cost of 15 Sanity. It is considered Meat, therefore if left on the ground, nearby Wildbores, Spiders and Snakes will be attracted to it and will eat it.
Usage[edit | edit source]
Tips[edit | edit source]
If the player wishes to deliberately spawn Crocodogs or Sea Hounds, dropping the Eye of the Tiger Shark in the ocean repeatedly is the quickest way of doing so due to its high hunger value. Each time it is dropped, there is a 37.5% chance of spawning the mobs.

The name might be a reference to the song Eye of the Tiger.
Food-wise, this item can be considered the Shipwrecked counterpart to the Deerclops Eyeball.

The '''Eye of the Tiger Shark''' is a [[Food]] [[Item]] introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is dropped by the [[Tiger Shark]] and can be used to craft the [[Super Spyglass]]. When eaten, it will restore 60 [[Health]], and 75 [[hunger]] at the cost of 15 [[Sanity]]. It is considered [[Meats|Meat]], therefore if left on the ground, nearby [[Wildbore]]s, [[Spider]]s and [[Snake]]s will be attracted to it and will eat it.

== {{pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item3 = Spyglass
|item2 = Gold Nugget
|item1 = Eye of the Tiger Shark
|tool = Science Machine
|result = Super Spyglass}}

== {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips==
* If the player wishes to deliberately spawn Crocodogs or Sea Hounds, dropping the Eye of the Tiger Shark in the ocean repeatedly is the quickest way of doing so due to its high hunger value. Each time it is dropped, there is a 37.5% chance of spawning the mobs.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The name might be a reference to the song ''[[Wikipedia:Eye_of_the_Tiger|Eye of the Tiger]]''.
* Food-wise, this item can be considered the ''Shipwrecked'' counterpart to the [[Deerclops Eyeball]].
